---
title: "INFO248-project2ms1-Wong-Wu"
author: "Zijian Wu & Adrian Wong"
date: "04/03/2026"
output: html_document:
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document:
    number_sections: true
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Install these libraries if necessary (run in Console, not here)
library(knitr)
library(caret)
library(rpart)
library(pROC)
library(ggplot2)
library(rattle)
library(randomForest)

# reproducibility
rand.v = "4.3.2"
seed.val = 123456
```

```{r}
js.df<- read.csv("job_salary_prediction_dataset.csv")
#hello
```
